## LibraryRuntime.FillingRecipeIngredientsFilter type

Filter for recipe ingredients. - string: Match ingredient ID exactly - RegExp: Match ingredient ID by pattern - ICategoryFilter: Match by category

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type FillingRecipeIngredientsFilter = string | RegExp | ICategoryFilter;
```
